short_summary: Iran deal close, markets, AI lawsuit
rationale: The US-Iran peace deal remains the dominant story directly involving US foreign policy and energy markets; SpaceX IPO and OpenAI lawsuit are notable domestic market and regulatory developments.

top_events.title: US-Iran peace deal within reach; Hormuz reopening signaled
top_events.summary: Iran signals Hormuz reopening if a deal is signed; UAE unfreezing funds adds momentum. A successful deal would lower US energy costs and reduce Middle East military exposure for American forces.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on stock market
top_events.summary: SpaceX's stock market debut drives Musk's net worth past $1 trillion, creating new market dynamics and investor interest in the space and tech sectors relevant to US markets.

top_events.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT
top_events.summary: A US lawsuit alleging ChatGPT contributed to a teenager's suicide adds legal and regulatory pressure on AI companies, potentially accelerating domestic AI safety legislation.
